# Ultima IV dungeon: hythloth
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  30  ladder_both
#   &  70  fountain
#   '  91  room_1
#   (  a0  altar
#   )  a1  altar_1
#   *  b0  door_special
#   +  c0  kind_c
#   ,  d0  door
#   -  d1  door_1
#   .  d2  door_2
#   /  d3  door_3
#   0  d4  door_4
#   1  d5  door_5
#   2  d6  door_6
#   3  d7  door_7
#   4  d8  door_8
#   5  d9  door_9
#   6  da  door_a
#   7  db  door_b
#   8  dc  door_c
#   9  dd  door_d
#   :  de  door_e
#   ;  df  door_f
#   <  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|FFF~FFF~|
|F!F(((<~|
|F~FFFFF~|
|~~~&F)F~|
|FFFFF~FF|
|F*F)~$~)|
|F~FFF~FF|
|F~~~F)F$|
== level 1 ==
|F~FFFFFF|
|~~~~F$~~|
|FFF+FFFF|
|F$F~~~~~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F~F~F%F~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F~F~~~~!|
== level 2 ==
|FFF-FFF~|
|F~~~~!F~|
|F~FFFFF~|
|F!F~~'F~|
|FFF~FFF~|
|F~~,F%F$|
|F~F~FFFF|
|~~F~F&~~|
== level 3 ==
|FFFFF~FF|
|F$~$F.~$|
|FFFFF~FF|
|F~~~~~F$|
|F~FFFFFF|
|~/F$F%F!|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~~~~~F$|
== level 4 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F!F!~~~!|
|F~F~FFFF|
|~~F~F&~!|
|FFF~FFF~|
|F10!F%F~|
|F2FFFFF~|
|F$F&~~~!|
== level 5 ==
|FFF~F~FF|
|F~~~F~F$|
|F~FFF~F~|
|F~F345F~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F~F~F%F~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F!F~F~~~|
== level 6 ==
|F~F~F~F~|
|~~+~~~~!|
|F~F~F~F~|
|~~~~~~~~|
|F+F~FFF+|
|~~~~F%F~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|~$~~~~+~|
== level 7 ==
|FFFFFFF~|
|F;F9876:|
|F~FFFF~F|
|F~F;F(~~|
|F~F~F~F+|
|F(((~!~(|
|FFFFF~FF|
|F!~~~(F;|
# crc32: 9d3bf9e9
